article.title: Google looks to tackle longstanding RCS spam in India — but not alone
article.summary: Google is integrating carrier-level filtering into RCS in India through a partnership with Airtel to strengthen protections against spam.

analysis.title_ja: Google looks to tackle longstanding RCS spam in India — but not alone
analysis.summary: Google is integrating carrier-level filtering into RCS in India through a partnership with Airtel to strengthen protections against spam.

all_candidates.title: Google looks to tackle longstanding RCS spam in India — but not alone
all_candidates.summary: Google is integrating carrier-level filtering into RCS in India through a partnership with Airtel to strengthen protections against spam.

all_candidates.title: OpenAI reveals more details about its agreement with the Pentagon
all_candidates.summary: By CEO Sam Altman’s own admission, OpenAI’s deal with the Department of Defense was “definitely rushed,” and “the optics don’t look good.”

all_candidates.title: Anthropic’s Claude rises to No. 1 in the App Store following Pentagon dispute
all_candidates.summary: Anthropic’s chatbot Claude seems to have benefited from the attention around the company’s fraught negotiations with the Pentagon.

all_candidates.title: 米軍のイラン攻撃に「Claude」が使われたことが判明　トランプ大統領による「使用停止命令」後
all_candidates.summary: トランプ大統領が国防総省にAnthropic製品の使用停止を命じた直後、米軍がイラン攻撃で同社のAI「Claude」を使用したことが判明した。安全策撤廃を巡る対立で同社が「サプライチェーンリスク」に指定され排除が決定的となる中、現場では依然としてAIが実戦投入される状況が浮き彫りとなった。

all_candidates.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro登場　思考モデルから実務エージェントへ、複雑タスクを完遂するAIに進化
all_candidates.summary: 思考力の強化に加え、エージェント実行能力を大きく押し上げたGemini 3.1 Pro。本稿では主要ベンチマークや機能改善を整理しつつ、「考えるAI」から「働くAI」へと進むモデル進化の方向性を、開発者視点のコメントとともに読み解く。
